sections.title: Stay & Dine with a * Hotel Dining Credit
items: Introductory Ticket Offer Get 7 Days of Park Awesome for the Price of 5 Days* Vacation like never before and enjoy summer savings with a week of excitement for the price of a 5-Day Ticket. Get ready for Universal Orlando Resort’s four amazing theme parks. *Ticket prices and availability vary by day. Restrictions apply. Get Details Learn More

sections.title: Get 7 Days of Park Awesome for the Price of 5 Days*
items: Vacation Package Save More with a Vacation Package Enjoy the most savings when you book a Universal Orlando vacation package including a 7-Day Ticket for the price of 5 days**. You'll also get a * hotel dining credit on a 5-Night or more stay at select Universal Orlando Resort hotels. Plus you'll also save up to ^ with an automatic Bundle and Save discount. *Based on a 5-night stay at select hotels. Limited availability. Restrictions apply. **Ticket prices and availability vary by day. Restrictions apply. ^Savings based on a 7-night stay. Select dates. Restrictions apply. Get Details Explore Package

sections.title: Save More with a Vacation Package
items: Florida Residents Florida Resident Passes From Less Than Per Month* After Down Payment This changes everything. Experience the thrills of Universal Studios Florida and Universal Islands of Adventure again and again with this Florida Resident Pass offer. Total Price plus tax *FL Resident 2-Park Seasonal Pass. FlexPay: down (tax inclusive), plus 11 monthly payments of (0% APR). Renews automatically. Blockout dates and restrictions apply. View Details Buy Now

sections.title: Florida Resident Passes From Less Than Per Month* After Down Payment
items: Florida Residents Save * on a 3-Day Park-to-Park Ticket This changes everything. Roam freely between Universal Epic Universe, Universal Studios Florida and Universal Islands of Adventure as you laugh, scream and vacation like never before with exclusive Florida resident savings. *Not available at the front gate. Use by Dec. 31, 2026. Restrictions apply. Get Details Buy Now

sections.title: Save * on a 3-Day Park-to-Park Ticket
items: Volcano Bay Nights Slide into an exclusive family-friendly event with rides, a live DJ and DreamWorks character meet and greets on select nights. Experience Universal Volcano Bay with an unforgettable nighttime beach party vibe. Universal Volcano Bay Nights is a separately-ticketed event held on select nights. Restrictions apply. Get Details Buy Now

sections.title: Volcano Bay Nights
items: Event Tickets Get Admission to Halloween Horror Nights Choose a night to experience the terror of The World’s Premier Halloween Event#. Buy online and save. #Named the “Golden Ticket Legend for Best Halloween Event” by Amusement Today. Savings vs front gate. Applies to select event admission tickets only. Pricing varies by date, subject to availability and to change until purchased. Exclusions and restrictions apply. Get Details Buy Now

sections.title: Get Admission to Halloween Horror Nights
items: Event Add-ons Enhance the Horror at Halloween Horror Nights Get to the fear faster with a Halloween Horror Nights Express Pass. Follow a VIP guide into the darkness with an R.I.P. Tour. Start your thrills sooner with a Scream Early Ticket. Or go inside with a Behind the Screams: Unmasking the Horror Tour. Get Details Buy Now

sections.title: Enhance the Horror at Halloween Horror Nights
items: Exclusive Event Halloween Horror Nights Premium Scream Night Event Nights: Aug. 27 or Oct. 19, 2026 Experience Halloween Horror Nights in a killer way. With shorter wait times compared to regular event nights plus select all-you-care-to-enjoy food, this is where horror lives the high life. Limited capacity. Subject to availability. Restrictions apply. Get Details Buy Now

sections.title: Halloween Horror Nights Premium Scream Night Event Nights: Aug. 27 or Oct. 19, 2026
items: Florida Resident Hotel Savings Save Up to 25%* at Universal Orlando Hotels Relaxation or excitement? Here, you don’t have to choose. A Universal hotel is an oasis in the middle of your getaway. And as a Florida Resident, you can save up to 25%* off your stay at participating hotels. *Savings vary by participating hotel based on availability. Restrictions apply. Get Details Book Now

sections.title: Bundle and Save on a Universal Vacation
items: Don't Miss a Beat at Universal Orlando

sections.title: Peacock Series: Epic Ride​
Find Your Oasis in the Middle of the Action
Butterbeer™ Season in The Wizarding World of Harry Potter™
items: Fanny Pack
Explore Universal Orlando Resort
Three Iconic Worlds. One Unforgettable Experience.
Universal Orlando Resort Hotels

When you stay at Universal Orlando Resort, you're getting much more than an awesome hotel room in an amazingly themed resort. Your hotel is an extension of the action, where you're always just minutes away from the theme parks. Wherever you are, the vacation keeps going.

Signature Collection Universal Helios Grand Hotel, a Loews Hotel Now Open Step into a sunlit sanctuary, where light and life abound. Rising above the waters of Celestial Park, Universal Helios Grand Hotel, puts you at Universal Epic Universe. Explore

sections.title: Universal Helios Grand Hotel, a Loews Hotel
items: Signature Collection Loews Portofino Bay Hotel Relax in beautiful, timeless surroundings inspired by the seaside village of Portofino, Italy. Wonderfully appointed rooms and suites combine with delights of every flavor to create the perfect family escape. Explore

sections.title: Loews Portofino Bay Hotel
items: Value Inns and Suites Universal Cabana Bay Beach Resort Enjoy vibrant, retro-style with rooms and suites brilliantly designed for fun and affordability. Explore

sections.title: Universal Cabana Bay Beach Resort
items: Prime Value Hotels Universal Aventura Hotel Experience a fresh and fun way to stay, with commanding views of all of Universal Orlando Resort. A sleek, stylish, perfectly priced escape that's just plain cool. Explore

sections.title: Universal Aventura Hotel
items: Value Inns and Suites Universal Endless Summer Resort - Dockside Inn and Suites It's all good. Universal Endless Summer Resort Dockside Inn and Suites lets you soak up the scenes of a serene escape and save with extra affordable rates - all in the middle of a Universal Orlando Resort vacation. Explore

sections.title: Universal Endless Summer Resort - Dockside Inn and Suites
items: Value Inns and Suites Universal Endless Summer Resort - Surfside Inn and Suites Step into the casual, free-spirited lifestyle of surf culture at Universal Endless Summer Resort Surfside Inn and Suites for an extra affordable Universal vacation. Explore

sections.title: Universal Endless Summer Resort - Surfside Inn and Suites
items: Signature Collection Loews Sapphire Falls Resort Step into paradise in the heart of the tropics. Blue waterfalls cascade over lush grounds and, in the distance, the calming sounds of steel drums call you to take in the scenic views, ease into island time and let go Explore

sections.title: Loews Sapphire Falls Resort
